title: Quantum Singular Value Decomposition
description: Master quantum algorithms for singular value decomposition including quantum SVD estimation, low-rank approximation, and applications to dimensionality reduction.
learningObjectives: Understand the quantum approach to singular value decomposition
Implement quantum singular value estimation algorithms
Apply quantum SVD to low-rank matrix approximation
Analyze quantum speedups for SVD-based applications
Connect quantum SVD to recommendation systems and PCA
